Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinuedBobbyP: Kilit kırmak için gereken pim. Kişinin ayrıca kilit kırmayı bilmesi, ve bir tornavidaya sahip olması gereklidir
Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinued_Lockp: Magazine for learn lockpicking. You will can lockpick doors, windows, vehicles by BetterLockpickingContinuedBobbyPin or crowbar
Tooltip_BetterLockpickingContinued_Alarm: Magazine for learn alarms. You will can check alarm of vehicle/house
